data.title: VINE rose above 0.04 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.96%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget market data shows that VINE rose above 0.04 USDT and is currently trading at 0.0423 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.96%.

data.title: Whales Accumulate 930,000 LTC Over Two Weeks
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst Ali has reported that whales have collectively purchased 930,000 Litecoin (LTC) over the past two weeks.

data.title: Zhu Di Holdings Halts Virtual Currency Mining Plans
data.description: According to PANews, Zhu Di Holdings, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, has announced the termination of its plans to establish a wholly-owned subsidiary, Zhu Di Digital Technology Co., Ltd., for engaging in virtual currency mining activities. The proposed subsidiary was intended to focus on the construction and operation management of virtual currency mining farms. The decision to cease these new business activities was made by the company's board of directors and is effective immediately.

data.title: Metalpha deposited 30,006 ETH to Binance four hours ago, equivalent to US$80.48 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, asset management company Metalpha recharged 30,006 ETH to Binance four hours ago, worth 80.48 million US dollars. It has been three months since Metalpha's multi-signature address last recharged a large amount of ETH, and the intention of the recharge has not been confirmed for the time being.

data.title: Whales bought 930,000 LTC in the past two weeks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to on-chain analyst Ali's monitoring, whales have bought a total of 930,000 LTC in the past two weeks.

data.title: Chainflip: Trying its best to stop the flow of funds related to the Bybit theft, but unable to completely block, freeze or redirect any funds
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Chainflip, a cross-chain bridge, responded to the request of Bybit CEO, saying: "We have tried our best to deal with the current situation, but as a decentralized protocol, we cannot completely block, freeze or redirect any funds. However, we have currently shut down some front-end services to prevent the flow of funds." 
Previously, Bybit CEO Ben Zhou posted on the X platform that hackers have been detected trying to transfer BTC through Chainflip. It is hoped that Chainflip will help Bybit block and prevent further transfers of assets to other chains.

data.title: Chainflip Addresses Bybit CEO's Request Amid Security Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, cross-chain bridge Chainflip has responded to a request from Bybit CEO Ben Zhou regarding the freezing of funds. Chainflip stated that while they are making every effort to address the current situation, as a decentralized protocol, they are unable to completely stop, freeze, or redirect any funds. However, they have closed some front-end services to prevent the movement of funds. Previously, Ben Zhou had posted on the X platform, indicating that hackers were attempting to transfer BTC through Chainflip and requested Chainflip's assistance in preventing further asset transfers to other chains.

data.title: Bybit’s stolen assets account for about 15% of the total amount stolen in the cryptocurrency industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the statistics of the hacker section of the DefiLlama website, Bybit’s stolen assets of more than 1.4 billion US dollars are the largest security incident in the history of cryptocurrency, accounting for about 15% of the stolen amount in all security incidents in the history of cryptocurrency. The panel data shows that the cumulative amount of stolen assets in the history of cryptocurrency exceeds 10.62 billion US dollars, of which DeFi-related stolen assets amount to 6.31 billion US dollars, and various cross-bridge projects have stolen assets of up to 2.87 billion US dollars.

data.title: BAN briefly broke through 0.17 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 65.71%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget market data shows that BAN briefly broke through 0.17 USDT and is currently trading at 0.1508 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 65.71%.

data.title: Tim Wong, Chairman of Catizen Foundation: I believe Bybit will successfully overcome the challenges
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Catizen Foundation Chairman Tim Wong said on Twitter that he firmly believes that Bybit will successfully overcome the current challenges. As one of Bybit's important partners, Tim reviewed Bybit's valuable support in the early stages of Catizen's development, especially in terms of marketing and resource integration.
Tim Wong emphasized that although Bybit is currently facing some challenges, he believes that Bybit will quickly resolve the current difficulties and draw strength from them to continue to grow and develop. The tweet reads: "What doesn't kill you will only make you stronger."
